title: Does form response viewer show all answers to check boxes?
excerpt: The form response viewer does not seem to show answers to checkboxes. Is there something wrong with my form? do I have to do something else?

posts.author: maemaebarcelona (Mae Barcelona)
posts.cookedHtml: The form response viewer does not seem to show answers to checkboxes. Is there something wrong with my form? do I have to do something else?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Mae!

Charlotte here from the monday team!

This sounds odd! Could you share a screenshot of how it appears in the board vs how it appears in the response viewer?

posts.author: maemaebarcelona (Mae Barcelona)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! Thanks for your response. Here’s a screenshot of the board.

And the PDF File only shows the columns for True or false - attached a portion of the screenshot of the PDF file (for data security purposes)
